title: neoregelia cyanea
intro: Neoregelia cyanea, commonly known as the 'Violet Queen', is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and long-lasting blooms. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its reported medicinal properties. The plant's extracts have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Neoregelia cyanea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a sought-after ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
